title: Interstellar
synopsis: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.
stars: Matthew McConaughey, Anne Hathaway, Jessica Chastain

title: The Revenant
synopsis: A frontiersman on a fur trading expedition in the 1820s fights for survival after being mauled by a bear.
stars: Leonardo DiCaprio, Tom Hardy, Domhnall Gleeson

title: Die Hard
synopsis: An NYPD officer tries to save his wife and several others taken hostage by terrorists during a Christmas party.
stars: Bruce Willis, Alan Rickman, Bonnie Bedelia

title: The Walk
synopsis: In 1974, high-wire artist Philippe Petit recruits a team to realize his dream: walking between the Twin Towers.
stars: Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Ben Kingsley, Charlotte Le Bon

title: Blade Runner 2049
synopsis: Young Blade Runner K's discovery of a long-buried secret leads him to track down former Blade Runner Rick Deckard.
stars: Ryan Gosling, Harrison Ford, Ana de Armas

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
synopsis: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, Max helps a rebel warrior flee across the desert from a tyrannical warlord.
stars: Tom Hardy, Charlize Theron, Nicholas Hoult

title: The Martian
synopsis: An astronaut becomes stranded on Mars and must rely on his ingenuity to survive and signal Earth.
stars: Matt Damon, Jessica Chastain, Kristen Wiig

title: Arrival
synopsis: A linguist works with the military to communicate with aliens who have arrived on Earth in mysterious ships.
stars: Amy Adams, Jeremy Renner, Forest Whitaker
